extraction.one_line_summary: VAN MOER escaped from a three-man breakaway inside final 12km after teammates GAMPER and GAUTIER softened pursuit, holding off COLBRELLI's charging peloton by seconds.
tactical_patterns: Bahrain exhausted chasing mid-distance for COLBRELLI sprint, lacked firepower to close final gap despite clear fastest sprinter
VAN MOER prioritized KOM points all day, pivoted to stage win only inside 12km when breakaway companions faltered
UAE rode for KRISTOFF who was dropped on finale climbs, MCNULTY mechanicaled, complete strategic failure for sprint option
Movistar positioning LÓPEZ with full team despite typical three-leader dysfunction concerns heading into mountain stages

rider_signals.VAN MOER Brent: positive: won from break after dominating all KOM points, tactical pivot inside 12km suggests strong racing instinct
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: neutral: dominated field sprint by margin but Bahrain team calculation error left him battling for second only
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: dropped on category 3/4 finale climbs, UAE's sprint option completely eliminated before real mountains
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: mentioned in trouble early on minor climbs, sprint form absent or climbing weakness exposed
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: negative: cited in trouble early alongside JAKOBSEN, concerning for versatile classics rider on modest gradients
rider_signals.GAMPER Patrick: neutral: stayed in break until late but surrendered, VAN MOER's escape suggests GAMPER cracked first
rider_signals.GAUTIER Cyril: neutral: abandoned break with GAMPER inside 12km, likely regretting cooperative error that cost stage chance
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: negative: mechanical at critical juncture supporting KRISTOFF, UAE sprint plan collapsed completely
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: commentary notes season form deficit, pressure mounting to prove leadership credentials for Tour selection
